history.event: Original runnable form authored at CCAgentindex/agents/global_ledger_steward/ as the project's first runnable steward. Endpoint POST /api/agents/global_ledger_steward/run live.
Unified Box pattern locked by DEC-2026-04-29-015. global_ledger_steward stays at legacy path pending migration.

ATOM-2026-04-30-0027 decided canonical path = LEDGERS/BOXES/<name>/steward/ (DEC-2026-04-30-004). ATOM-0029 added _agent_resolve_prompt helper to server.py — checks legacy first, then unified Box. ATOM-0044 (this migration) builds the unified Box around the existing runnable steward without breaking it: legacy files stay in place; this Box adds the manifest + per-Box orientation + steward config alongside; resolution helper continues to find the legacy prompt first so live dispatches keep working through the migration window.
